summary: Testing of refactored modal components (MerchantPayModal, WithdrawalModal, PaymentSettingsModal) wired into ClientDashboard.jsx with USE_REFACTORED_MODALS=true flag. All three modals are properly wired and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: USE_REFACTORED_MODALS flag (line 59) correctly set to true in ClientDashboard.jsx
All three refactored components imported correctly (lines 9-11)
MerchantPayModal (lines 1785-1803) properly wired with all required props
WithdrawalModal (lines 1998-2021) properly wired with isOpen, balance, phone/amount/network states, methods, and callbacks
PaymentSettingsModal (lines 2518-2529) properly wired with settings state, isSaving, and onSave callback
Conditional rendering based on USE_REFACTORED_MODALS flag works correctly - old inline modals remain as fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactored modal components are fully integrated. USE_REFACTORED_MODALS=true enables the new extracted components. The feature flag pattern allows easy rollback if needed by setting to false.

WithdrawalModal.flow_tested: Dashboard -> Withdraw button -> Modal opens with MoMo/Bank toggle

PaymentSettingsModal.flow_tested: WithdrawalModal -> Bank option -> Configure Bank Account -> PaymentSettingsModal opens

MerchantPayModal.flow_tested: /pay/SDM-M-6D343A81 -> Sign In to Pay -> Login -> Modal opens with merchant info

feature_flag_implementation.description: When true, uses extracted MerchantPayModal, WithdrawalModal, and PaymentSettingsModal components. When false, falls back to inline modal implementations.
